title: MikroTik RB924iR-2nD-BT5&BG770A&R11e-LR9G, KNOT LR9G kit
description: The MikroTik KNOT LR9G kit is a flexible industrial IoT gateway for asset tracking, remote monitoring, and efficient automation ( Modbus and GPIO ) with support for LoRa 915MHz , LTE Cat. M1 (LTE-M), LTE Cat. NB2 , Bluetooth , Wi-Fi and GPS . It is equipped with (2) 10/100Mbps ports (1x PoE-In, 1x PoE-Out) LTE-M and NB2 with significantly lower operating costs compared to standard LTE data plans LoRa 915MHz , Bluetooth 5.2 , Wi-Fi 4 and GPS RS485/Modbus with data transmission via MQTT or HTTP GPIO pins with monitoring capabilities Bluetooth beacon tracking (1) 10/100Mbps 802.3af/at PoE-In port and (1) 10/100Mbps 802.3af PoE-Out port Flexible power options - DC connector, Micro USB, or PoE Device Power adapter 24V/1,2A Screws and wall plugs DIN rail mounting kit USB OTG cable
